elements.original_description: A 2D colorful cartoon graphic of a person standing in a sticky puddle of mud, looking frustrated. The mud is dark brown and the person wears a bright yellow shirt. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: professional 2D minimalist cartoon graphic of a person standing in a sticky puddle of mud, looking frustrated. The mud is dark brown, glossy, and thick. The person has a simple cartoon design, wearing a bright yellow shirt for contrast. Pure white background, clean flat vector art, high contrast, no shading or gradients, vibrant colors, no text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
